article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. Proposed Bylaw Amendments - Zoning Bylaw Rewrite - Revised New Non-Residential Zoning Districts 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to vote on five new non-residential zoning districts
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on proposed changes to Burnaby's Zoning Bylaw that would create five new zoning categories (districts) for non-residential land — affecting employment, industrial, agricultural, and mixed-use areas — as part of the city's long-term land use plan.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — new zoning rules could affect where and how your business can operate.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw non-residential districts amendment — Council vote
